features.name: Neural Network Model Training and Inference
features.description: Lets users train browser-side neural networks via TensorFlow.js on a dataframe column with configurable architecture and hyperparameters, then apply the trained model to new data for in-browser prediction.
features.evidence_summary: trainNN, applyNN, and isApplicableNN share the 'NN' name root and together implement Datagrok's standard ML model lifecycle interface (train → applicability check → predict).

features.name: Neural Network Visualization
features.description: Renders an interactive visual representation of a trained TensorFlow.js neural network for a selected input/output column pair, giving users insight into model structure and activations.
features.evidence_summary: visualizeNN accepts a trained model object alongside two columns and produces a visualization, making it a clearly separate presentational capability from training and inference.
